user.title: Swiss Parking
user.description: Live free parking spaces from the parking guidance system of a Swiss city. One entry per city — add the integration again for another city. Currently supported: Zürich, Basel, Winterthur, Bern, Frauenfeld.

error.cannot_connect: The city's parking feed could not be reached.
error.no_garages: The city's parking feed returned no garages.
